description_en: Budapest may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 177 halal restaurants and 27 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Budapest, Hungary, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Budapest: 150 halal restaurants listed, 27 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3/5.
